    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    HttpHeaderList.Void
    Represents no header list in annotations.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.header that return HttpHeaderList
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.append(String name, String value)
    Appends a header constructed from the given name and string value.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.append(String name, Supplier<String> value)
    Appends a header constructed from the given name and lazy value supplier.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.append(List<HttpHeader> values)
    Appends the given headers in order.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.append(HttpHeader value)
    Appends the given header.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.append(HttpHeader... values)
    Appends the given headers in order.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.caseSensitive(boolean value)
    Sets whether header-name comparisons are case-sensitive.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.copy()
    Returns a copy of this list.
    static HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.create()
    Creates a new empty HttpHeaderList.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.forEach(String name, Consumer<HttpHeader> action)
    Performs an action on each header whose name matches.
    static HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.of(List<HttpHeader> headers)
    Creates a new HttpHeaderList initialized with the given headers.
    static HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.of(HttpHeader... headers)
    Creates a new HttpHeaderList initialized with the given headers.
    static HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.ofPairs(String... pairs)
    Creates a new HttpHeaderList initialized with the given alternating name/value pairs.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.removeAll(String name)
    Removes all headers with the given name.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.set(String name, String value)
    Sets a header with the given name and value, replacing any prior entry with the same name.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.set(HttpHeader value)
    Sets the given header, replacing any prior entry with the same name.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.set(HttpHeader... values)
    Sets the given headers, each replacing any prior entry with the same name.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.setDefault(String name, String value)
    Sets a default header with the given name and value (first-in-chain wins per name).
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.setDefault(HttpHeader value)
    Sets the given header as a default.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.setDefault(HttpHeader... values)
    Sets the given headers as defaults, in order.
